name: @parischap-dev/effect-lib
description: An extension to the official Effect library
author: Jérôme MARTIN

scripts.clean-config-files: shx rm -f package.json && shx rm -f tsconfig.json
scripts.checks: pnpm circular && pnpm lint && pnpm tscheck && pnpm test
scripts.clean-prod: shx rm -rf dist && shx mkdir -p dist
scripts.build: pnpm clean-prod && pnpm compile && cd ${prodFolderName} && pnpm i && cd ..
scripts.compile: tsc -b tsconfig.esm.json --force && babel dist/esm --out-dir dist/cjs--plugins @babel/transform-export-namespace-from --plugins @babel/transform-modules-commonjs  --source-maps && babel dist --plugins annotate-pure-calls --out-dir dist --source-maps && pnpm prodify-lib
scripts.build-and-publish: pnpm build && pnpm checks && pnpm publish-to-npm
